news.t: Best Gold Miner ETFs for Q2 2021
Miner ETFs shine as gold and silver notch a winning July
Gold settles at highest in a week as Fed Chair Powell's remarks feed expectations for interest-rate cuts
Gold futures post a decline of 1% for the week
Gold futures post biggest monthly gain in 3 years
Gold cools off after rally to 6-year highs, and charts suggest larger pullback ahead
Gold investors have been waiting a long time for this breakout moment and it's happening
Why Gold Price Is Likely To Touch $1,550
Gold futures settle at a 14-month high

holdings.infoBox: GOEX is an equity ETF with a total of 56 individual holdings. The top holdings are Hecla Mining Company stock at 5.09%, Coeur Mining at 4.47%, DPM Metals at 4.10%, Eldorado Gold at 3.73%, and Alamos Gold at 3.63%.

overview.description: The Global X Gold Explorers ETF (GOEX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in materials equity. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of global stocks in the gold mining industry as an explorer or developer. GOEX was launched on Nov 3, 2010 and is issued by Global X.
infoTable: Solactive Global Gold Explorers & Developers Index

data.title: Best Gold Miner ETFs for Q2 2021
data.text: The best gold miner ETFs for Q2 2021 are SGDJ, GOEX, and RING.

data.title: Miner ETFs shine as gold and silver notch a winning July
data.text: Precious-metals exchange-traded funds powered higher Friday as investors continued to bid up gold and silver.

data.title: Gold settles at highest in a week as Fed Chair Powell's remarks feed expectations for interest-rate cuts
data.text: Gold futures climbed sharply on Wednesday, settling at their highest in a week, after remarks from U.S. Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell were seen as dovish.

data.title: Gold futures post a decline of 1% for the week
data.text: Gold futures fell sharply on Friday to tally a loss of 1% for the week, but prices managed to hold above the key $1,400 mark.

data.title: Gold futures post biggest monthly gain in 3 years
data.text: Gold futures edged higher Friday, posting a monthly climb of nearly 8%--their biggest since June 2016.

data.title: Gold cools off after rally to 6-year highs, and charts suggest larger pullback ahead
data.text: The red-hot gold trade is cooling off on Wednesday, and Mark Newton of Newton Advisors says the charts point to further weakness to come.

data.title: Gold investors have been waiting a long time for this breakout moment and it's happening
data.text: Investors are piling into gold, sending the precious metal to a six-year high on Monday, and analysts think the commodity has established a base to go even higher.

data.text: Gold rallies with stocks and bitcoin nears $10,000.

data.text: Jeffrey Gundlach is betting on gold, as he expects the dollar to finish the year lower.

data.text: Gold is moving higher, and is now trading about 1% away from its 52-week high. Todd Gordon says the chart indicates it might soon top that mark.

data.title: Gold will break out of slump and test 2018 highs: Standard Chartered’s precious metals expert
data.text: One of Wall Street’s top metals expects predicts gold will breakout this year.

data.title: Gold futures end at lowest since December, down 1.5% for the week
data.text: Gold futures posted a modest decline on Thursday, to tally a loss of 1.5% for the week.

data.title: Gold settles higher, then slips in electronic trade after FOMC minutes
data.text: Gold prices finished higher on Wednesday to tally a fourth straight session gain as concerns of a slowdown in the global economy helped boost investment interest in the precious metal.
